problem.headline: $3 trillion in crypto. Zero quantum defense.

qubits.label: Qubits to Break Bitcoin
qubits.sub: logical qubits required for a cryptographically relevant quantum computer

solution.typewriter_text: Quantus is a Layer 1 blockchain built from the ground up with post-quantum cryptography at every layer. Signatures, P2P communications, SSH keys. Not a patch on existing infrastructure. A clean-slate protocol designed for the world that's coming.

wallet.label: Wallet
wallet.description: Your quantum-secure key to the Quantus network. Available on iOS and Android.

technology.label: Technology
technology.description: Post-quantum cryptography, engineered from first principles.

community.headline: The people building the quantum-secure future.

newsletter.headline: The window is open.
newsletter.sub: Get quantum security updates, protocol news, and early access straight to your inbox.
newsletter.error_message: Please fill in all fields with a valid email address.

success.headline: You're in.
success.sub: We'll keep you ahead of the curve.

hero_banner.sub: Quantus isn't a general purpose blockchain. It does one thing better than any chain in existence - quantum-secure, private, scalable money.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Built clean. No legacy. No compromises.
architecture.content: Every existing blockchain was built before quantum computers were a real threat. That means their security is borrowed time. Quantus was built after - with post-quantum cryptography as the foundation, not a feature.

signatures.title: Quantum-Secure Signatures
signatures.body: Every transaction on Quantus is signed with ML-DSA - a NIST-approved post-quantum algorithm. The same standard governments and institutions are adopting now.

network_layer.title: Secured Network Layer
network_layer.body: Most chains only secure transactions. Quantus secures everything - including the communications between nodes. There's no weak point in the stack.

scale.title: Built to Scale
scale.body: Post-quantum signatures are larger than classical ones. We solved that with a zero-knowledge proof system that compresses thousands of transactions into a single verifiable proof - without sacrificing security.

cryptography.title: Cryptography
cryptography.subtitle: The standard quantum can't break.
cryptography.content: In 2024, NIST finalized its post-quantum cryptography standards. Quantus was already building with them.

meaning.title: What This Means
meaning.body: Classical blockchains use elliptic curve cryptography. A sufficiently powerful quantum computer can break it - deriving private keys from public ones, forging transactions, stealing funds. ML-DSA, the algorithm Quantus uses, has no known quantum vulnerability. Its security is based on a class of mathematical problems that quantum computers cannot solve efficiently.

urgency.title: Why It Matters Now
urgency.body: Quantum computers capable of breaking today's blockchains don't exist yet. But harvesting attacks do - adversaries collecting encrypted data today to decrypt later. The window to migrate is closing. Quantus doesn't need to migrate. It was already there.

scalability.title: Scalability
scalability.subtitle: More secure. Not slower.
scalability.content: Post-quantum cryptography comes with a tradeoff - larger signatures mean fewer transactions per block. Every chain working on quantum security will hit this wall. Quantus already solved it.

stat.label: Throughput Improvement
stat.sub: vs raw post-quantum transactions with ZK proof aggregation

scalability.description: Thousands of transactions. One compact proof. Verified on-chain.

consensus.title: Consensus
consensus.subtitle: Proof-of-Work. Built for ZK.
consensus.body: Quantus uses Proof-of-Work consensus - the same battle-tested model as Bitcoin. One change: the hash function is optimized for zero-knowledge proof systems, making Quantus's ZK infrastructure natively efficient rather than bolted on.

cta.title: The full technical picture.
cta.sub: Protocol architecture, cryptographic assumptions, and the complete security model - in the Quantus whitepaper.

hero_banner.title: Quantum-secure from the ground up. In your pocket.
hero_banner.sub: Send, receive, and secure your assets with post-quantum cryptography built into every transaction. Available on iOS and Android.

advantage.heading: Security that starts at the chain.
advantage.body: Most wallets are only as secure as the blockchain underneath them. Every existing chain uses elliptic curve cryptography, the kind a sufficiently powerful quantum computer can break. Quantus is built differently. Post-quantum cryptography is the foundation of the chain, not a feature added on top. Your wallet inherits that security by default.

features.heading: Designed for security. Built for humans.

reversible.title: Reversible Transactions
reversible.body: Set a time window on outgoing transfers. Changed your mind? Cancel before the window closes. A safety net that does not compromise finality.

checkphrases.title: Check-Phrases
checkphrases.body: Every Quantus address has a human-readable checksum. A short sequence of memorable words generated from your address. Verify the phrase before you send. Protection against typos, copy-paste tampering, and address poisoning attacks.

high_security.title: High-Security Accounts
high_security.body: Assign a guardian to your account. A hardware wallet, multisig, or trusted party. Any suspicious transaction can be cancelled during a reversal period. Opt-in, permanent, and composable.

encrypt.title: Encrypt Your Funds
encrypt.body: Every transaction on Quantus is signed with ML-DSA, a NIST-approved post-quantum algorithm. Your funds are encrypted at the protocol level, not the app level. No patch. No migration. Already there.

issues.heading: Your wallet today. Still safe when quantum arrives.
issues.body: Most crypto users will not know when quantum computers become a real threat. By then, migrating to a secure wallet will be chaotic, slow, and expensive. The Quantus wallet means you do not have to think about it. You are already on the right side of the shift.

cta.title: Own quantum-secure assets.
cta.note: Public beta available now on iOS and Android

hero.title: Built by people who saw the threat before it was obvious.
hero.sub: Quantus Network is a team of engineers, researchers, and operators building the infrastructure for a post-quantum financial system.

mission.heading: Build the most secure blockchain of the quantum era. Without compromising usability or performance.
mission.body1: Every decision we make, from protocol design to user interface, is built on deep technical knowledge and a respect for simplicity. We focus on the fundamentals: mathematically proven security, high performance, and a product experience that feels effortless.
mission.body2: We build with precision. We move fast without cutting corners. And we build for the world that is coming, not the one that has already passed.

contact.heading: Want to work with us or learn more?
contact.body: For partnerships, press, and investment enquiries:

hero.title: Quantum Secure Your Crypto
hero.subtitle: Quantus Network, the L1 Blockchain for the Quantum Era

video.title: Build value on cryptography that lasts.
video.description: Quantus is here for people who see what's coming; the next wave of innovation. A future-proof, quantum-secure blockchain that can secure today's value against tomorrow's threats.

benefits.title: The Future is Quantum
benefits.description: Quantus Network is a Layer 1 blockchain designed to thrive in the quantum era. Secured with post-quantum cryptography and scaled with zero-knowledge proofs, it delivers a level of security, scalability and usability that today's chains can't match. A clean-slate design that anticipates the coming wave of quantum technology.

quantum_secure.title: Quantum Secure at Every Layer
quantum_secure.description: Secured with NIST-backed post-quantum cryptography, every layer of Quantus from transaction signatures to P2P communication is engineered to resist attacks that would break today's blockchains. Built to endure, and ready to evolve with the quantum era.

zero_knowledge.title: Zero-Knowledge by Design
zero_knowledge.description: Recursive zero-knowledge proofs keep the network fast. Instead of reprocessing everything, nodes verify compact proofs - reducing overhead and ensuring the system grows smoothly under real demand.

security_control.title: Security You Control
security_control.description: Quantus puts you in charge. You decide how assets move, how they're protected, and who to trust. Complexity is handled in the background, so your experience feels clear, secure, and built to last into the quantum future.

meta.title: Download Quantus Wallet | Quantum-Secure Crypto App
meta.description: Quantus: Quantum-secure Layer 1 blockchain. Download our wallet for post-quantum protected assets.

app.title: Download Quantus Wallet
app.description: The Quantus App puts quantum security and zero-knowledge scalability directly in your hands. Every safeguard runs silently in the background, so you can focus on what matters: moving value with clarity, confidence, and control.

reversible_transactions.title: Reversible Transactions
reversible_transactions.description: Set a reversible window for every send. Made a mistake? Didn't receive the goods you were promised? Fat fingers struck again? Simply reverse the transaction before the timer's up.

readable_checkphrases.title: Readable Checkphrases
readable_checkphrases.description: No more copy-paste paranoia. Send with confidence using unique, human-friendly checkphrases you'll actually recognize. No typos, no lookalike scams, just clear, unmistakable destinations.

security_guardians.title: Security Guardians
security_guardians.description: You choose your trusted allies and give them the power to step in and intercept a transfer before it goes through. A safety net of your own design, protecting your assets when you can't.

beneficiary_recovery.title: Beneficiary & Recovery
beneficiary_recovery.description: Plan for the long term. Assign a recovery account or beneficiary to inherit your funds if you're gone. Your assets stay protected, even during unexpected events. Think of it as your will, enforced by code.

cta.title: They say quantum is years away. They said the same about AI.

meta.title: Quantum Risk Checker | Scan Your Wallet or ENS for Q-Day Risk
meta.description: Check any Ethereum wallet or ENS name for quantum threats. Get your Q-Day risk score instantly and see how secure your crypto really is.

checker.subtitle: QUANTUM RISK CHECKER
checker.title: Are you safe on Qday?
checker.description: Analyze your Ethereum address for quantum computing vulnerabilities. Our tool checks transaction history and balance to provide a comprehensive quantum security risk assessment.

definition.title: The Quantum Deadline
definition.paragraph_one: Q-Day is the moment when quantum computers can break the cryptography that secures most of today's digital world. The algorithms behind secure web connections, software updates, banking systems, and email, such as RSA and elliptic-curve cryptography, would no longer be safe.
definition.paragraph_two: Even data encrypted years earlier could be harvested now and decrypted later, exposing confidential information across governments, businesses, and individuals.

consequence.title: What does Q-day mean for Blockchains and Digital Assets
consequence.paragraph_one: Blockchains depend on elliptic-curve digital signatures to prove ownership of funds. On Ethereum for example, every outgoing transaction permanently exposes a wallet's public key.
consequence.paragraph_two: A quantum computer could use a public key to mathematically derive the private key, allowing attackers to forge valid signatures and transfer assets without the owners knowledge.
consequence.paragraph_three: A network-wide scramble to adopt quantum-safe protocols would follow, but by then unprepared chains could already be compromised.
consequence.invitation_two: to see how vulnerable your address is and take action before Qday.

method.title: How it Works
method.subtitle: The Quantum Risk Scanner scans any Ethereum address and gives it a Quantum Readiness Score, a Risk Level, and a Grade.
method.factor_title: Two primary risk factors drive the score:

factors.title: Public-key Exposure
factors.content: Whether the address has ever sent a transaction and revealed its key.

factors.title: Balance Sensitivity
factors.content: The higher the ETH balance, the more attractive the target.

method.factor_usage: From these signals we calculate a numerical score and map it to simple, A-F Grades and Risk levels clear enough for you to act on.
analysis_items: Risk Level: Very High / High / Medium / Low / Very Low
Grade: F / D / C / B / A / A+
Key Exposure status: Exposed or Not yet exposed

hero.title: Quantus Quests
hero.description: Quantus Quests are a series of challenges designed to reward our earliest and most active community members. By completing Quests, secure your status as an early adopter and you will earn USDC.

info.description: A battle for a $500 USDC prize pool, boosted airdrop points, and the ultimate title: The King of the Shill.

play_guide.title: How to Play
guides: Go to the Quantus Quests tab to find your referral link (The Qcat).
Share your code with your friends & foes.
Watch the live leaderboard to track your position in real-time.

goal.title: The Goal:
goal.content: Refer the most users to the Quantus Wallet using your unique invite code. Only referrals that create a wallet will be counted.

win.title: How to Win:
win.content: Hold the #1 spot for 72 consecutive hours.

card.title: The Quantum Twist
card.content_one: The #1 spot on the leaderboard is represented by a live, reversible 10,000 QUAN transaction. If another user overtakes you, the transaction automatically reverses and is sent to the new leader. The claim to the $300 USDC prize moves with it.
card.content_two: To win the grand prize, you must claim the #1 spot and hold it for 72 consecutive hours. Once you do, the 10,000 QUAN transaction finalizes, the prize is secured, and the challenge concludes.

meta.title: Quantus Tokenomics & Launch Allocation
meta.description: QUAN token supply, distribution, and launch allocation details. Fixed supply of 21M QUAN with fair launch mechanics.

launch.title: Quantus Tokenomics & Launch Allocation

overview.title: Overview
overview.content: Quantus has a fixed maximum supply of **21,000,000 QUAN**. The token is issued through a combination of an initial Token Generation Event (TGE) and long-term Proof-of-Work mining. This structure is designed to avoid pre-mining, minimize insider advantages, and align long-term network security with user participation.

supply.title: Token Supply
supply.note: The mining emission follows an exponentially decaying block reward curve, meaning issuance is higher in the early years and gradually slows over time as supply approaches the maximum.

tge.title: Launch Allocation (TGE)
tge.intro: The following tokens are minted and distributed at the Token Generation Event:
tge.note_1: All private and public sale tokens are fully liquid at launch. There are no investor lockups or vesting schedules.
tge.note_2: Public sale proceeds (USDC) are paired 1:1 with QUAN and deposited directly into a liquidity pool. If the full 10% public sale fills, another 10% is minted to match it — 100% of public sale proceeds go into the LP.

mining.title: Mining-Based Distribution (65%)
mining.intro: The remaining 65% of supply — **13,650,000 QUAN** — is distributed through Proof-of-Work mining over approximately 40 years.

company.title: Company Alignment
company.intro: Quantus does not pre-mine or reserve tokens for the team.
company.content: Instead, the company is compensated through a dev tax on block rewards:
points: A portion of each block reward is allocated to the company. This acts as protocol-level vesting — tokens are earned alongside the network over approximately 5 years.
This avoids Bitcoin's early supply curve problem, where early miners accumulated massive holdings that create perpetual overhang risk.

launch.vesting_summary: All private and public sale tokens are fully liquid at TGE. The team and advisors vest over four years with a one-year cliff. Company tokens are never pre-mined — they are earned gradually through a dev tax on block rewards.

fees.title: Fees & Burning
fees.intro: To support long-term network security, wormhole transactions incur a **0.1% volume fee**:
fees.note: This introduces deflationary pressure as network usage grows.

funding.title: Funding History
funding.intro: Two private rounds are closed, with 7% of total supply sold. Token valuation is 2x equity valuation — industry standard, reflected in all contracts. All fundraising going forward is token sales only.

meta.title: About Quantus Network | Our Vision for a Quantum-Secure Future
meta.description: Discover Quantus Network's mission to build a quantum-secure blockchain ecosystem. Learn who we are, our goals, and how we protect the next era of crypto.

content.p1: Quantus Labs LLC is a technology company focused on building infrastructure for decentralized, censorship-resistant technologies. Our flagship project, Quantus Network is a Layer 1 blockchain designed to be simple, open-source, and community-owned from day one.
content.p2: We believe in the power of open protocols, proof-of-work, and sovereign ownership. The Quantus Network app—available on desktop and mobile—lets users store digital assets, mine new blocks, and participate in a fairer financial future without intermediaries.
content.p3: We're committed to transparency, privacy, and empowering individuals through secure, self-custodial tools.
